name: risk-score-gauge
title: Risk Score Gauge
description: A single clinical risk score as a semicircular gauge — the arc fills and colors by band (low → critical) with the value read large in the well, and a Tooltip disclosing the scale.

props.name: band
props.description: Drives arc color and the band chip.

props.name: percent
props.description: Arc fill 0–100. Defaults from a numeric value, else 0.

props.name: scale
props.description: Model + cut-points, shown in a Tooltip on the label.

clinicalNotes: `percent` (arc fill) and `band` (color + label) are intentionally independent: many scores are categorical (qSOFA 0–3, Braden) where the raw number and its risk cut-point don't map linearly — the caller sets both. Bands use the shared tone system (low=success … critical=destructive-solid) and are always labeled in text, not color alone. Always disclose the underlying model and its thresholds via `scale` — a risk number is meaningless without the instrument that produced it. The gauge has role=img with an accessible band label.
notes: Layer-M1 atom (core gap). Feeds RiskScoresPanel (M2) and the Triage/ED board.
